suppress.notes: file name: spring-boot-devtools-4.0.7.jar msg: False positive. CVE-2022-31691 affects the Spring Tools 4 IDE extension for Eclipse/VSCode, not the spring-boot-devtools library. OWASP matches on the vmware:spring_tools CPE which is incorrectly assigned to this artifact.

CVE-2026-53914 (CVSS 9.8): Unsafe deserialization in Kotlin build cache metadata. Fixed in Kotlin 2.4.20, which is not yet available as a stable release (only Beta1 as of 2026-06-29). Suppressed until stable fix ships. Revisit when 2.4.20 stable is released.
